description: A purchase order document from Cycle City to a customer

sku.instruction: The stock keeping unit of the item

description.instruction: A detailed description of the product

quantity.instruction: The quantity of the product ordered

unit_price.instruction: The unit price of the product

line_total.instruction: The total price for the line item

option_color.instruction: The color option of the product

option_size.instruction: The size option of the product

option_weight.instruction: The weight option of the product

option_battery.instruction: The battery option of the product

option_range.instruction: The range option of the product

option_speed.instruction: The speed option of the product

option_wheel_size.instruction: The wheel size option of the product

option_brake_type.instruction: The brake type option of the product

option_certification.instruction: The certification option of the product

po_number.instruction: The unique identifier for the purchase order

order_date.instruction: The date when the order was placed

order_total.instruction: The total amount for the order

special_requests.instruction: Any special requests or notes included in the order

order_items.instruction: A list of all items ordered
